<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sys_ux_screen"><sys_ux_screen action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>false</active><app_config display_value="TAM Workspace">e63e5ecf83eccb10921ac710feaad329</app_config><description/><disable_auto_reflow>false</disable_auto_reflow><disable_interoperable>false</disable_interoperable><event_mappings/><macroponent display_value="Data Import default">1aebbb9f83a44350921ac710feaad31b</macroponent><macroponent_config>{
    "bare": {
        "type": "JSON_LITERAL",
        "value": true
    },
    "headerLevel": {
        "type": "JSON_LITERAL",
        "value": "1"
    },
    "headingOnlyVisibleToScreenReaders": {
        "type": "JSON_LITERAL",
        "value": false
    },
    "interceptNotifications": {
        "type": "JSON_LITERAL",
        "value": false
    },
    "label": {
        "type": "JSON_LITERAL",
        "value": ""
    },
    "propagateNotifications": {
        "type": "JSON_LITERAL",
        "value": false
    },
    "scrollable": {
        "type": "JSON_LITERAL",
        "value": "y"
    }
}</macroponent_config><name>Data Import default</name><order>0</order><parent_macroponent display_value="Workspace App Shell">c276387cc331101080d6d3658940ddd2</parent_macroponent><required_translations>[ ]</required_translations><rollback_screen/><screen_condition/><screen_type display_value="Data Import">9aeb3bdb83a44350921ac710feaad308</screen_type><sys_class_name>sys_ux_screen</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>dungvu.dev</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-05-05 06:24:34</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>eaebbb9f83a44350921ac710feaad35f</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Data Import default</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="Talent Acquisition Management" source="x_1763182_talent_0">c2f046ee83900310921ac710feaad3cf</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Talent Acquisition Management">c2f046ee83900310921ac710feaad3cf</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_ux_screen_eaebbb9f83a44350921ac710feaad35f</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>dungvu.dev</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-05-07 03:52:07</sys_updated_on></sys_ux_screen><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=eaebbb9f83a44350921ac710feaad35f"/></record_update>
